portfolio_read.description: Read the current paper portfolio snapshot.

portfolio_summary.description: Generate a portfolio summary markdown view.

portfolio_patch.description: Patch parts of the paper portfolio snapshot.

memory_search.description: Search durable memory markdown files for relevant snippets.

memory_get.description: Read a focused durable memory snippet by path and line range.

memory_read.description: Read durable memory documents by category or path.

memory_write_markdown.description: Append a concise, LLM-summarized durable bootstrap memory note to an approved markdown path.

memory_append_daily_log.description: Append durable notes to the dated daily memory log.

memory_write_portfolio_summary.description: Rewrite the portfolio summary markdown from the current portfolio state.

backtest_prepare_dataset.description: Prepare and freeze a historical backtest dataset by discovering a usable MCP market-data provider and fetching the requested range.

backtest_run_dataset.description: Run a prepared historical backtest dataset and return only the final structured result.

backtest_asset.description: Queue an end-to-end historical backtest for a single asset. The run continues in the background and the final result is delivered back to the originating session.

backtest_portfolio.description: Queue an end-to-end historical backtest for an explicit portfolio. The run continues in the background and the final result is delivered back to the originating session.

backtest_current_portfolio.description: Queue an end-to-end historical backtest starting from the current paper portfolio snapshot frozen at submission time. The final result is delivered back to the originating session.

config_get.description: Read MCP or LLM configuration files.

config_patch.description: Patch MCP config or JSON-backed LLM config.

config_apply.description: Replace MCP or LLM config with raw content.

install_mcp.description: Install an MCP server entry into MCP config.

install_skill.description: Install a skill from a local path or git URL.

verify_runtime.description: Verify MCP or LLM runtime configuration.

restart_runtime.description: Schedule a full stock-claw process restart.

cron.description: Create, inspect, update, run, and remove scheduled monitoring or reminder jobs.

session_status.description: Inspect the current session summary, spawned specialists, and recent backtest jobs.

sessions_spawn.description: Spawn a specialist subagent for a focused task and return its summary.

sessions_list.description: List specialist runs already spawned under the current root session.

sessions_history.description: Read specialist result history for the current root session or request.

telegram_react.description: Add a Telegram reaction to the current user message in the active Telegram chat.

telegram_download_attachment.description: Download and save an attachment from the current Telegram user message.

telegram_send_file.description: Send a file artifact to the current Telegram chat session.

exec_command.description: Run a local shell command for CLI workflows and skills such as mcporter. Destructive delete or removal commands require explicit user confirmation.

web_search.description: Search the web through the best available MCP-backed research tool.

web_fetch.description: Fetch a webpage through the best available MCP-backed research tool.
